bio.p1Rest: with Node, JS, TS, born in Spain and living between Extremadura and the Portuguese Alentejo, in love with a wonderful Alentejana woman. I build scalable web applications with JavaScript, TypeScript, the right framework on the frontend, and Node.js and Express on the backend.
bio.p2: Clean Code and SOLID are not buzzwords — they are the minimum standard. Off the keyboard, I run my own homelab as a Raspberry Pi fan and Cloudflare user, with Docker and Home Assistant, because tech autonomy is also a philosophy of life.
bio.p3: But this structure would not be sustained without the basis of everything: my mother. Her selflessness and unwavering strength are the driving force that taught me to be, before anything else, a good person. From her I learned not to give up on anything and to understand that character is forged in perseverance. She is the root of my integrity.
bio.p4: And when I am not in front of a screen, I live a countryside life: I tend orange trees, vineyards, olive groves, and the vegetable garden. I am an electrician, mechanic, bricklayer, assembler, plumber, and a would-be locksmith (the true artist and the one who taught me everything is my father). The patience of an annual cycle re-educates the way I write code and reshapes the way I want to live in this world.

about.description: Full Stack Developer at Sngular, based in Spain. I build scalable web applications with TypeScript, Vue and Angular on the frontend, Node.js and Express on the backend. Clean Code and SOLID aren't buzzwords — they're the baseline. Off the keyboard, I run my own homelab on Raspberry Pi, Docker, and Home Assistant, because tech autonomy is a lifestyle. And when I'm not in front of a screen, I tend vineyards and olive trees. Founder of RootDevs.

I believe in clean architectures and making sound decisions: the problem dictates the tool, not the other way around...
contact.label: CONTACT

hero.portraitAlt: Francisco Javier - Creative Technologist and FullStack Web Master
hero.subtitle: Engineering high-performance digital experiences with the right tools. High performance, low latency.
hero.title: & FullStack Web Master

mimacrame.description: Artisan e-commerce featuring Clean Architecture, a multilingual catalogue, and a detail-oriented premium visual experience.

detail.impact: Live platform driving real sales. It stands out for its immaculate codebase, high testability, and robust frontend architecture ready to scale, reflecting the rigor of professional and sustainable development.
detail.longDescription: Mi Macramé Studio is an e-commerce built with Angular 21 and Firebase. The codebase adheres strictly to Clean Architecture and Feature-Driven Development principles, ensuring modularity and long-term maintainability. It integrates Stripe for secure payments, pure Signals for zoneless reactive state management, and comprehensive i18n support. The entire project is governed by strict linter rules (ESLint/Prettier) ensuring an exceptional code standard. The UI, crafted with BEM SCSS and a mobile-first approach, reflects an obsessive care for accessibility, smooth animations, and user experience.

mimacrame.title: Mi Macramé Studio

portfolio.description: Personal portfolio showcasing zoneless Angular 21, strict linter rules, micro-interactions, and Clean Code.

detail.impact: A true laboratory of industry best practices: from strict file organization to the usage of modern browser APIs. It is tangible proof of my passion for detail, performance, and technical excellence.
detail.longDescription: Built entirely in Angular 21 zoneless mode utilizing Signals, this portfolio is a statement on how modern software should be written. The codebase enforces custom ESLint rules to sort imports and component decorators, ensuring pristine readability. It incorporates the View Transitions API, complex animations (3D CSS Tilt, Magnetic Buttons) handled optimally, full multilingual support, flawless HTML semantics, and extreme asset optimization (WebP/Lazy loading)—all structured within a highly scalable architecture.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio

techStack.lead: The framework doesn't lead. The problem does. My stack is whatever each project needs — and everything orbiting here has time in production.
techStack.title: Modern Workflow

t1.author: Fran Méndez
t1.quote: I have had the pleasure of working with Javier for several years. He stands out for his impeccable work ethic, technical mastery, and constant commitment to excellence. Always willing to share his knowledge and elevate the team's level. A professional with whom it is a privilege to collaborate. 🚀

t2.author: Barbaño González
t2.quote: Javier is a positive person who likes challenges and does not give up easily. He has been teaching me programming very patiently, introducing me to the Open-source world. If you are looking for a dynamic and trusty colleague, Javier should be your choice. 👩‍💻

t3.author: Joaquín Engelmo
t3.quote: Javier is a great example of 'overcoming'. He is a quick-learner and hard-worker, always willing to learn and try things without fear. If you need a person with focus on the detail and really passionate, Javier is your guy. 💪
